summary: Completed comprehensive testing of DeezLink security telemetry system, authentication, and frontend functionality

minor_issues.issue: Gift card routes were not properly registered due to API router inclusion order
minor_issues.fix_applied: Moved app.include_router(api_router) call to after all route definitions

ui_bugs.issue: Email waiting page not displayed after form submission in automated test
ui_bugs.note: May be timing issue in test automation, manual testing needed

ui_bugs.issue: Buy buttons not clickable in automated test due to overlay
ui_bugs.note: Buttons are visible but automation reports 'Element is not visible'

passed_tests: Homepage loads with DeezLink branding and trending tracks
Login page loads correctly with form and 'Secured by DeezLink telemetry' badge
Security telemetry system initializes correctly (console shows fingerprint generation)
Admin login at /admin works with credentials admin@deezlink.com / DeezLink2024!
Offers page loads with 3 packs (Solo/Duo/Family) and custom quantity option
Gift Card purchase page works with amount selection and preview
Backend API: POST /orders/create WITHOUT telemetry returns 403
Backend API: POST /orders/create WITH telemetry returns 200
Backend API: POST /auth/magic returns email_sent field and session_id
Backend API: POST /auth/magic/resend endpoint exists and works
Backend API: Admin login with correct credentials works
Backend API: Admin login with wrong credentials returns 401
Backend API: Gift card purchase endpoint works after fix
Backend API: All public endpoints (stats, packs, deezer, geo) working
Backend API: Custom order creation with telemetry validation working
